description: A formal official government headshot portrait of a clean-cut, bearded white man in his 40s (DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin / SecMullinDHS, referenced in the tweet promoting his account). He wears a dark navy suit, white dress shirt, a red-and-blue patterned tie, and a small American-flag lapel pin, and smiles directly at the camera. He is posed in the standard government-portrait composition between a U.S. flag on the left (stars and red/white stripes visible) and a blue flag bearing the circular seal of the Department of Homeland Security (eagle emblem and the words 'DEPARTMENT' and 'HOMELAND SECURITY' partly visible) on the right. The image is a high-resolution professional studio photograph with even lighting, not a designed graphic; it carries no added on-image slogan or meme typography. There is only a small faint DHS wordmark/logo at the very top. Intent: a routine 'must follow' promotional portrait elevating the new DHS Secretary; messaging is conveyed by the tweet text, not the image.
notable_text: (no designed on-image text; faint DHS logo only)
